message:
✨ Add info icon to Predicted bubble in Node Offline Detection card (#536)

Shows users that there's tooltip information available when hovering
over the Predicted block.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
